publishedAbstract: - No warning is populated while performing the upgrade activity. [image=[src="images/screenshot_from_2025-03-29_16-29-13.png", alt="This cluster should not be updated to 4.16. You can continue to update to patch releases in 4.15.", size="LG- Large", data-cp-size="100%", data-cp-align="center", caption="In cluster settings below warning should be popped up for upgrade path.", lightbox="true"]]
publishedTitle: LSO operator does not give a warning when the operator is on a n-1 version than the RHOCP4
